name: patchistry-commerce
description: AI agent access to Patchistry's modular hat catalog — tools for canvases, patches, curated builds (bachelorette, wedding, Father's Day, festival), shipping policy, and contact methods. Real-time queries against the live Patchistry Shopify catalog.

tools.name: list_canvases
tools.description: Return the 3 Patchistry Canvas hats (Black, Khaki, Pink) — $30 each.

tools.name: list_patches
tools.description: Return Patchistry patches filterable by category (Signature/Candyz) or occasion keyword.

tools.name: get_curated_build
tools.description: Return full curated build for an occasion (bachelorette, wedding, dads, festival, etc.).

tools.name: recommend_build
tools.description: Natural-language query → top 3 matching curated builds.

tools.name: get_shipping_policy
tools.description: Free US shipping, 30-day returns, 2-3 business day ship time from SoCal.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Customer support, founder, group orders, press, partnerships contact methods.
